scripts.deploy:prod: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-prod.yml -f docker/docker-compose-db.prod.yml -f docker/docker-compose-redis.prod.yml up -d
scripts.tear:down: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-prod.yml -f docker/docker-compose-db.prod.yml -f docker/docker-compose-redis.prod.yml down -v --remove-orphans
scripts.dev: concurrently -k --names api,ui --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:ui"
scripts.dev:full: bun run dev:infra:up && bun run dev
scripts.setup: cp -n .env.example .env && bun install && bun run dev:db:init && bun run --filter '@app/redis' infra:up
scripts.reset: bun run dev:db:reset && bun run --filter '@app/redis' infra:reset && bun run --filter '@app/redis' infra:up
scripts.stop: bun run --filter '@app/api' down && bun run --filter '@app/ui' down && bun run --filter '@app/db' infra:down && bun run --filter '@app/redis' infra:down
scripts.dev:infra:up: bun run infra:up && bun run --filter '@app/db' wait:15 && bun run --filter '@app/db' db:migrate && bun run --filter '@app/db' db:grant && bun run --filter '@app/db' db:seed
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run --filter '@app/api' test
